data.title: Atos Supported the European Space Agency in Selecting Twelve Service Providers through an Open Competition to deliver Advanced Applications & Services on the DestinE Platform
data.description: Atos assisted the European Space Agency (ESA) in choosing 12 service providers through a competitive process to provide advanced applications and services on the DestinE platform.

data.title: Energy market defined by “striking contradiction”, according to latest Willis Energy Market Review
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in London, a recent Energy Market Review by Willis, a WTW business, revealed that the energy insurance market continues to stay soft. This is despite increasing loss activity, social inflation, and geopolitical uncertainty. The market boasts ample capacity, strong competition, and a consistent decrease in rates. The report showcased the resilience of the market, even in the face of these challenges. Willis, a WTW business trading under NASDAQ as WTW, highlighted these trends in their latest publication.

data.description: In the latest report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, marking a decline of 0.5% from the previous month. This decrease represents a total of 250,000 individuals finding employment during this period. Additionally, it was noted that the GDP growth for the last quarter was 3.8%, exceeding expectations and showcasing a strong economic recovery. These figures indicate positive trends in both the job market and overall economy, providing optimism for the future.

data.title: Medical Spa Market Outlook 2026-2031: $47.17 Bn by 2031 Driven by Surging Demand for Non-Invasive Aesthetic Treatments, Says Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 16, 2026, reports from Mordor Intelligence reveal that the medical spa industry's market size is anticipated to hit USD 26.2 billion in 2026, showing an increase from USD 23.29 billion in the previous year. Projections suggest a further climb to USD 47.17 billion by 2031, depicting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.48% through the mentioned period.

data.title: Yadea Debuts at Motorbike Istanbul as World's Top Electric Two-Wheeler Brand, Entering Turkish Market
data.description: Yadea, a prominent electric motorcycle brand, will be introducing itself to the Turkish market for the first time at the Motorbike Istanbul exhibition. This marks a significant move in its worldwide growth strategy. The debut will take place from April 22 to April 25 at Hall 8 (8.SALON), Booth 8-151.

data.title: Fleet Card Market Expected to Reach $4756.6 Billion by 2034
data.description: The fleet card market is undergoing significant changes due to rising fuel prices, increasing demand for real-time expense monitoring, and the swift adoption of telematics and digital payment solutions. The market landscape is being transformed by these forces. In Wilmington, Del., on April 16, 2026, Allied Market Research reported these market shifts.

data.title: LankaPay, SLTDA and Alipay+ Join Hands to Drive Tourism Growth and Local QR Payment Adoption
data.description: In a recent strategic move, LankaPay, Sri Lanka Tourism Development Authority (SLTDA), and Alipay+ have joined forces to boost Sri Lanka's tourism sector and attract more international visitors, with a focus on Asia and the broader Asia-Pacific (APAC) area. The collaboration aims to capitalize on the capabilities of Alipay+, a unified wallet gateway from Ant International, facilitated by LankaPay, to establish Sri Lanka as a favored destination for travelers. This collaboration is set to significantly impact the tourism industry in Sri Lanka and is poised to increase visitor arrivals from the Asian continent and beyond.

data.title: Anatomage Brings Anatomage Theater to the UK with First Installation at Manchester Metropolitan University
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, on April 16, 2026, Anatomage Inc., a prominent provider of advanced educational technology, revealed the inauguration of the initial Anatomage Theater in the United Kingdom at Manchester Metropolitan University. This marks a significant advancement in medical and science education standards.

data.title: Mitek and Synectics Solutions Partner to Help UK Insurers Tackle Rising Digital Fraud While Expanding Fair Access to Insurance
data.description: In a recent partnership announcement, Mitek, a company listed on NASDAQ as MITK, has teamed up with Synectics Solutions to enhance fraud detection in digital insurance applications within the UK market. By integrating Mitek’s identity verification and anti-spoofing technology with Synectics’ fraud orchestration platform and the National SIRA consortium – the largest cross-sector risk intelligence collaboration in the UK – insurers can now strive to identify fraudulent activities at an earlier stage, safeguarding legitimate customers in the process. This collaborative effort not only strengthens fraud prevention measures but also streamlines the verification process, ultimately improving access to insurance coverage for genuine applicants.

data.title: Harbour BioMed Appoints Dr. Adam Zong as President
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Harbour BioMed, a worldwide biopharmaceutical firm (HKEX: 02142), headquartered in Cambridge, Mass., Rotterdam, Netherlands, and Shanghai, announced their dedication to creating innovative antibody therapies in immunology, oncology, and beyond.
